metadata.description: Oliver's custom MCP connector plugin marketplace

plugins.name: ames-meta
plugins.description: Meta Business Suite MCP connector for Facebook Pages, Instagram, Threads, Ads Manager, Commerce, Conversions API, and related Graph API workflows.

plugins.name: ames-ynab
plugins.description: YNAB MCP connector for budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, accounts, months, payees, and budget review workflows.

plugins.name: ames-sprout
plugins.description: Sprout Social MCP connector for analytics, inbox messages, social listening, publishing, media uploads, and support cases.

plugins.name: ames-lytho
plugins.description: Lytho Workflow MCP connector for work requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, files, and preferences through the Lytho Open API.

plugins.name: ames-imagerelay
plugins.description: Image Relay MCP connector for digital asset management, files, folders, collections, products, metadata, upload links, and webhooks.

plugins.name: ames-unifi
plugins.description: UniFi Network MCP connector for controller management, clients, devices, firewall, Wi-Fi, VPN, switching, hotspot, and traffic tools.
